creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
Martin Polden reported me that irc/irssi-fish refuses to build on C
shell (which he is using) with a fix to replace the occurences of
'$(pwd)' to '`pwd`' in Makefile. This PR fixes the issue.

Thanks to Martin.

How-To-Repeat: 
1. Start C shell:

% csh

2. In C shell, build the irssi-fish port:

% sudo make -C /usr/ports/irc/irssi-fish build
